## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Imubit to discuss content strategy progress and team changes.](https://fathom.video/share/S5dmX6sHgjo8ZxJDNfVviM6gcd6MC4ND?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Rebecca Murtagh is leaving Imubit; Allison remains point of contact, Tim to increase involvement](https://fathom.video/share/S5dmX6sHgjo8ZxJDNfVviM6gcd6MC4ND?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
  - Content strategy showing initial traction: 10 articles published, \<1000 impressions, first clicks appearing
  - [Workforce transformation survey (150 responses) data incoming; valuable for content hooks](https://fathom.video/share/S5dmX6sHgjo8ZxJDNfVviM6gcd6MC4ND?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)
  - [Need to establish baseline metrics and conversion tracking mechanisms for content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/S5dmX6sHgjo8ZxJDNfVviM6gcd6MC4ND?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)

## Topics

### Team Changes at Imubit

  - [Rebecca Murtagh leaving Imubit; last day end of next week](https://fathom.video/share/S5dmX6sHgjo8ZxJDNfVviM6gcd6MC4ND?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
  - [Allison continuing as main point of contact for content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/S5dmX6sHgjo8ZxJDNfVviM6gcd6MC4ND?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
  - [Tim to increase involvement in the project](https://fathom.video/share/S5dmX6sHgjo8ZxJDNfVviM6gcd6MC4ND?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)
  - [Imubit evolving team structure, planning to hire for new roles](https://fathom.video/share/S5dmX6sHgjo8ZxJDNfVviM6gcd6MC4ND?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)

### Content Strategy Progress

  - [10 articles published so far](https://fathom.video/share/S5dmX6sHgjo8ZxJDNfVviM6gcd6MC4ND?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)
  - Google Search Console data: \<1000 impressions, first clicks appearing
  - [SEO traction building slowly; Google's testing phase observed (rapid initial visibility followed by decrease)](https://fathom.video/share/S5dmX6sHgjo8ZxJDNfVviM6gcd6MC4ND?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)
  - [Mariana committed to maintaining strategy and realizing Rebecca's content vision](https://fathom.video/share/S5dmX6sHgjo8ZxJDNfVviM6gcd6MC4ND?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)

### Metrics and Measurement

  - [Need to establish baseline metrics: current organic traffic, keyword rankings](https://fathom.video/share/S5dmX6sHgjo8ZxJDNfVviM6gcd6MC4ND?tab=summary&timestamp=214.0)
  - [Explore mechanisms to track content funnel driving conversions](https://fathom.video/share/S5dmX6sHgjo8ZxJDNfVviM6gcd6MC4ND?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
  - [Tim to be involved in connecting analytics dots](https://fathom.video/share/S5dmX6sHgjo8ZxJDNfVviM6gcd6MC4ND?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)

### Workforce Transformation Survey

  - [Survey conducted, aiming for 300 responses, received \~150](https://fathom.video/share/S5dmX6sHgjo8ZxJDNfVviM6gcd6MC4ND?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)
  - [PR agency preparing one-pager analysis of survey results](https://fathom.video/share/S5dmX6sHgjo8ZxJDNfVviM6gcd6MC4ND?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)
  - [Data expected to provide valuable hooks for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/S5dmX6sHgjo8ZxJDNfVviM6gcd6MC4ND?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)

### AI Guide Development

  - [AI guide outline evolving; Mariana to work with Tim for guidance](https://fathom.video/share/S5dmX6sHgjo8ZxJDNfVviM6gcd6MC4ND?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
  - [New outline in progress](https://fathom.video/share/S5dmX6sHgjo8ZxJDNfVviM6gcd6MC4ND?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Mariana to reschedule meeting with Tim (out of office next week)](https://fathom.video/share/S5dmX6sHgjo8ZxJDNfVviM6gcd6MC4ND?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Send sync report to Tim summarizing today's meeting](https://fathom.video/share/S5dmX6sHgjo8ZxJDNfVviM6gcd6MC4ND?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
  - [Continue asking about workforce transformation survey results](https://fathom.video/share/S5dmX6sHgjo8ZxJDNfVviM6gcd6MC4ND?tab=summary&timestamp=407.0)
  - [Establish baseline metrics for content performance](https://fathom.video/share/S5dmX6sHgjo8ZxJDNfVviM6gcd6MC4ND?tab=summary&timestamp=214.0)
  - [Develop mechanisms to track content-driven conversions](https://fathom.video/share/S5dmX6sHgjo8ZxJDNfVviM6gcd6MC4ND?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
  - [Work with Tim on evolving AI guide outline](https://fathom.video/share/S5dmX6sHgjo8ZxJDNfVviM6gcd6MC4ND?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
